content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "搭捷運去台北車站",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，請問這個捷運站有到台北車站嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yì si, qǐng wèn zhè ge jié yùn zhàn yǒu dào Tái běi chē zhàn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 zhe4 ge5 jie2 yun4 zhan4 you3 dao4 Tai2 bei3 che1 zhan4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, does this MRT station go to Taipei Main Station?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 이 지하철역이 타이베이 역까지 가나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "可以，你搭紅線，在台北車站下車。",
          "pinyin": "Kě yǐ, nǐ dā hóng xiàn, zài Tái běi chē zhàn xià chē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ke3 yi3, ni3 da1 hong2 xian4, zai4 Tai2 bei3 che1 zhan4 xia4 che1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, you take the Red Line and get off at Taipei Main Station.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 빨간색 노선을 타시고 타이베이 역에서 내리세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "需要轉車嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Xū yào zhuǎn chē ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xu1 yao4 zhuan3 che1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Do I need to transfer?",
          "translation_ko": "환승이 필요합니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不用，這是直達的。下一班車大概三分鐘到。",
          "pinyin": "Bú yòng, zhè shì zhí dá de. Xià yì bān chē dà gài sān fēn zhōng dào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu2 yong4, zhe4 shi4 zhi2 da2 de5. xia4 yi4 ban1 che1 da4 gai4 san1 fen1 zhong1 dao4.",
          "translation_en": "No, it's direct. The next train arrives in about three minutes.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 직통입니다. 다음 열차가 약 3분 후에 도착합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "太好了，謝謝你！",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le, xiè xiè nǐ!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "tai4 hao3 le5, xie4 xie4 ni3!",
          "translation_en": "Great, thank you!",
          "translation_ko": "정말 좋네요, 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Which line should the person take?",
          "question_ko": "그 사람은 어떤 노선을 타야 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Red Line", "Blue Line", "Green Line"],
          "options_ko": ["빨간색 노선", "파란색 노선", "초록색 노선"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones and the polite tone of voice.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice asking for directions to a different MRT station, using the phrases from this dialogue."
    },
    {
      "title": "在公車站等車",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "請問，這個站牌有到學校的公車嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng wèn, zhè ge zhàn pái yǒu dào xué xiào de gōng chē ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "qing3 wen4, zhe4 ge5 zhan4 pai2 you3 dao4 xue2 xiao4 de5 gong1 che1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, does this bus stop have a bus that goes to the school?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 이 정류장에서 학교로 가는 버스가 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有，你可以搭二八五號公車。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, nǐ kě yǐ dā èr bā wǔ hào gōng chē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "you3, ni3 ke3 yi3 da1 er4 ba1 wu3 hao4 gong1 che1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, you can take bus number 285.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 285번 버스를 타시면 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "下一班車要等幾分鐘？",
          "pinyin": "Xià yì bān chē yào děng jǐ fēn zhōng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xia4 yi4 ban1 che1 yao4 deng3 ji3 fen1 zhong1?",
          "translation_en": "How many minutes until the next bus?",
          "translation_ko": "다음 버스는 몇 분 후에 오나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "大概十分鐘。你要去哪裡下車？",
          "pinyin": "Dà gài shí fēn zhōng. Nǐ yào qù nǎ lǐ xià chē?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "da4 gai4 shi2 fen1 zhong1. ni3 yao4 qu4 na3 li3 xia4 che1?",
          "translation_en": "About ten minutes. Where do you want to get off?",
          "translation_ko": "약 10분입니다. 어디서 내리실 건가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我在學校門口下車。謝謝你！",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zài xué xiào mén kǒu xià chē. Xiè xiè nǐ!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zai4 xue2 xiao4 men2 kou3 xia4 che1. xie4 xie4 ni3!",
          "translation_en": "I'll get off at the school gate. Thank you!",
          "translation_ko": "학교 정문에서 내릴게요. 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Which bus number should the person take?",
          "question_ko": "그 사람은 몇 번 버스를 타야 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["285", "258", "528"],
          "options_ko": ["285", "258", "528"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the numbers and the polite expressions.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice asking about a bus to a different location, using the phrases from this dialogue."
    },
    {
      "title": "叫計程車去夜市",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "司機先生，我要去夜市，麻煩你。",
          "pinyin": "Sī jī xiān shēng, wǒ yào qù yè shì, má fan nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "si1 ji1 xian1 sheng1, wo3 yao4 qu4 ye4 shi4, ma2 fan5 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Driver, I'd like to go to the night market, please.",
          "translation_ko": "기사님, 야시장에 가고 싶습니다. 부탁드립니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，請問地址在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn dì zhǐ zài nǎ lǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5, qing3 wen4 di4 zhi3 zai4 na3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, what's the address?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 주소가 어디인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "在台北車站附近，大概二十分鐘的路程。",
          "pinyin": "Zài Tái běi chē zhàn fù jìn, dà gài èr shí fēn zhōng de lù chéng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zai4 Tai2 bei3 che1 zhan4 fu4 jin4, da4 gai4 er4 shi2 fen1 zhong1 de5 lu4 cheng2.",
          "translation_en": "It's near Taipei Main Station, about a 20-minute drive.",
          "translation_ko": "타이베이 역 근처입니다, 약 20분 거리예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "現在路上有點塞車，可能要三十分鐘。",
          "pinyin": "Xiàn zài lù shàng yǒu diǎn sāi chē, kě néng yào sān shí fēn zhōng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xian4 zai4 lu4 shang4 you3 dian3 sai1 che1, ke3 neng2 yao4 san1 shi2 fen1 zhong1.",
          "translation_en": "There's a bit of traffic now, so it might take 30 minutes.",
          "translation_ko": "지금 길이 좀 막혀서 30분 정도 걸릴 수 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒問題，請帶我去。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèn tí, qǐng dài wǒ qù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 wen4 ti2, qing3 dai4 wo3 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, please take me there.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 저를 데려가 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why might the trip take longer than expected?",
          "question_ko": "예상보다 이동 시간이 더 걸리는 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Traffic", "The driver is lost", "The night market is far"],
          "options_ko": ["교통 체증", "기사가 길을 잃음", "야시장이 멀다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the polite requests and the explanation about traffic.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice telling a taxi driver a different destination and asking about the travel time."
    }
  ]
}
